## EPIC 3: Code Editor

Professional code editing experience with Monaco editor, hierarchical file tree, and automatic syntax highlighting.

### User Stories

- [ ] US-3.1: Edit Component Code in Professional Editor
- [ ] US-3.2: Browse Project Files in Hierarchical Tree
- [ ] US-3.3: Automatic Syntax Highlighting by File Type

### Key Files
- `src/components/editor/CodeEditor.tsx` - Monaco editor integration
- `src/components/editor/FileTree.tsx` - Expandable file/folder tree
